scores.notes: There are several minor text accuracy issues, including misspellings ('eanly modem Europeis history', 'creatorof theGreat Courses'Food:A Cuftural Culinay History', 'anidThreeWorld Cuisines', 'Carn egeInstitution's', 'Cruse puces', 'Aadpp fees', 'subecl lo chane', 'MacquarieUniversity of-ModermHistory', 'hasbeerat', 'Tne Big History Project', 'ther Big History Gates.directing Macquarie Unlversity's Big His').
